Command.Name: login
Command.Description: Store encrypted auth material for a profile.

Option.Description: Device id or device name override (case-insensitive).
Print the resolved request plan and exit without mutating.
My.JDownloader account email.
Emit the default stable JSON envelope contract (v1).
Disable ANSI color output.
Output mode override: human or json.
Read the password from stdin without echo.
Saved profile to use for auth, defaults, and output settings.
Suppress prompts and non-essential stderr chatter.
Timeout override in seconds.
Increase diagnostic detail on stderr.
Skip confirmation prompts for destructive operations.
